items.title: Fed Governor Michelle Bowman warns against hiking interest rates because of inflation spike
items.summary: Bowman said reacting to the inflation surge, driven primarily by energy prices and tariffs, has proven ineffective.

items.title: CFTC sues Rhode Island over actions against prediction markets
items.summary: It marks the seventh state the commission has sued in a dispute over who has the right to regulate event contract platforms.

items.title: Gaming association says states have lost $1 billion in tax revenue due to prediction markets
items.summary: Bill Miller, American Gaming Association president and CEO, added that prediction market platforms in his view amount to "backdoor sports betting."
